raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup (5 cm diameter) is within the right arm workspace, unobstructed, and its size allows secure claw grasp.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is securely held by the right end-effector and cleared from the tabletop surface."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table area front-right, away from all boxes",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "Robot is holding the cup; the chosen front-right region of the table is free of objects and provides at least 10 cm × 10 cm clearance.",
    "Postcondition": "Cup is released on the specified safe area, eliminating collision risk during subsequent box manipulation."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "Front face of box_1 is accessible; no obstacles (cup already removed) lie in the forward push path; required 10 cm clearance exists in front of box_1 to separate it from box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is translated ~10 cm forward, creating a gap between box_1 and the attached box_2, leaving all objects stable."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "A lateral gap now exists on both sides of box_1; both arms can approach its left and right faces without interference from box_2 or table edges; the robot has sufficient clearance above to lift the 30 cm cube.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held between the two end-effectors, lifted slightly above the table surface, completing the pick-up action."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup (5 cm diameter) is within the right arm workspace, unobstructed, and its size allows secure claw grasp.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is securely held by the right end-effector and cleared from the tabletop surface.

parsed_json.Target: table area front-right, away from all boxes
parsed_json.Precondition: Robot is holding the cup; the chosen front-right region of the table is free of objects and provides at least 10 cm × 10 cm clearance.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Cup is released on the specified safe area, eliminating collision risk during subsequent box manipulation.

parsed_json.Precondition: Front face of box_1 is accessible; no obstacles (cup already removed) lie in the forward push path; required 10 cm clearance exists in front of box_1 to separate it from box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is translated ~10 cm forward, creating a gap between box_1 and the attached box_2, leaving all objects stable.

parsed_json.Precondition: A lateral gap now exists on both sides of box_1; both arms can approach its left and right faces without interference from box_2 or table edges; the robot has sufficient clearance above to lift the 30 cm cube.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held between the two end-effectors, lifted slightly above the table surface, completing the pick-up action.
